market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: SpaceX targets June 11 IPO pricing, picks Nasdaq for historic market debut
articles.description: Elon Musk’s rocket and satellite company has accelerated plans for its blockbuster public offering, with trading expected to begin as early as June 12 after a faster-than-expected SEC review.

articles.title: A hotel check-in system left a million passports and driver’s licenses open for anyone to see
articles.description: The tech company that maintains the hotel check-in system set its cloud storage to public, allowing anyone to access customers' data without a password.

articles.title: US law firm files motion requesting redistribution of $344M USDt linked to Iran
articles.description: Law firm Gerstein Harrow LLP is attempting to claim frozen cryptocurrency funds for claimants of unrelated judgments stretching back decades.

articles.title: Silicon Valley’s vacationland needs a new energy provider just as AI is driving prices up
articles.description: Lake Tahoe, Silicon Valley's favorite vacation spot, is about to get hit with higher energy prices as AI drives demand for electricity.

articles.title: Price predictions 5/15: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
articles.description: Sellers have pulled Bitcoin back below the $79,000 level, but buying may emerge as the price nears the $76,000 support.

articles.title: Bitwise launches US-listed Hyperliquid fund with staking rewards
articles.description: BHYP offers spot exposure to Hyperliquid’s HYPE token and will stake a portion of its holdings through Bitwise’s in-house staking division.

articles.title: Tesla reveals two Robotaxi crashes involving teleoperators
articles.description: Newly unredacted crash reports reveal some of the troubles Tesla has had as it tries to scale its robotaxis.

articles.title: Myanmar’s military government proposes life in prison for crypto scammers
articles.description: The text of Myanmar’s Anti-Online Fraud Bill said that anyone who was convicted of committing “digital currency fraud” could face from ten years to life in prison, and possibly the death penalty.

articles.title: Saudi Arabia is tokenizing its multi-trillion dollar economy to protect its wealth from global shocks
articles.description: The chairman of droppRWA has secured $12.5 billion in mandates to tokenized real estate and his plans are to go beyond properties to bring trillions of dollars onchain.

articles.title: 銀河系藏著上億顆中子星，羅曼太空望遠鏡要用重力找出它們
articles.description: 天文學家早已知道，中子星、也就是大質量恆星爆炸後留下的緻密核心，應該散布於整個銀河系中，但其中大多數幾乎無法直 […]

articles.title: 科學家找到粒線體如何維持自身健康的關鍵：珍珠化
articles.description: 最近科學家發現名為「粒線體珍珠化」現象，可能是細胞維持 DNA 及健康平衡的關鍵。粒線體被譽為細胞的發電廠，因 […]

articles.title: Lombard joins LayerZero exodus as $4 billion in assets switch to Chainlink's bridge
articles.description: The shift comes after the Kelp DAO exploit drained $292 million from its LayerZero-powered bridge, increasing concerns over the security of cross-chain infrastructure.

articles.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT for personal finance, will let you connect bank accounts
articles.description: Once users connect their accounts, they will see a dashboard of their portfolio performance, spending, subscriptions, and upcoming payments.

articles.title: Ethereum analysts see ‘downside risks’ as bears eye 20% ETH price drop
articles.description: Ethereum analysts said that increasing supply on exchanges and declining ETF demand put ETH at risk of another leg down to $1,700.

articles.title: CME, ICE push U.S. regulators to scrutinize Hyperliquid over manipulation risks
articles.description: CME Group and ICE have reportedly warned the CFTC and Capitol Hill officials that Hyperliquid’s decentralized perpetual futures platform could enable market manipulation and sanctions evasion.

articles.title: Power prices are up 76% on America’s biggest grid, and a watchdog is pointing fingers
articles.description: The price spike is a reminder of a deeper problem: The U.S. power grid was not designed for the electricity demands of an AI-driven economy, and the gap between what the grid can deliver and what the industry needs is widening.

articles.title: US orders travelers on Air Force One to throw away gifts, pins, and burner phones after China trip
articles.description: While the summit appeared cordial, China remains a key adversary of the United States, given its advanced intelligence and espionage capabilities.

articles.title: Iran war shows markets no longer sleep
articles.description: The latest conflict involving Iran has produced an unexpected proving ground for financial infrastructure, and an unlikely winner has emerged, argues Huang.

articles.title: Crypto’s CLARITY Act faces partisan fight over ethics on Senate floor
articles.description: While Senator Tim Scott touted yesterday’s markup as bipartisan, just two Democratic senators supported the bill, and no Democratic amendments were adopted.

articles.title: Crypto market structure bill clears key hurdle as ethics debate looms over floor vote
articles.description: The Clarity Act cleared the Senate Banking Committee with bipartisan support, setting up a potential full Senate vote within weeks.
